text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hmm hmm. ♪ It's finally here, the special sale day
for croquettes—

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much! I'm off!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Hi, Ines. You're just getting off work?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I still have to go to my next job, but I'm going to
do a quick run on my way there!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I gotta utilize this time between shifts! Bye now!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
It's nothing! Just that... well, isn't she just the
picture of youthful energy?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Giving it a hundred percent to chase your
dreams... Oh, to be young.
choice_data_list: Let's give this break a hundred percent too!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oops, did that inspire you? I swear, kids these
days.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I'll do it for you, though. After all, I have a strong
sense of responsibility.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Plus, I want to go for a run anyway.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, Nice Nature and I put all our youthful
energy into training.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: What? Give this break... a hundred percent?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Pfft... hahaha! Then I guess we better rest like we
mean it!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Maybe I'll get some veggie croquettes today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We eat veggie croquettes and rejuvenate
ourselves.
